scripts.dev:server: cd server && PORT=3001 npm run dev
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names server,client,exploit,dash -c yellow,cyan,magenta,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:exploit" "npm run dev:dashboard"
scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install && cd ../exploit-server && npm install && cd ../dashboard && npm install
